title: New Balance Kid's 519 V2 Alternative Closure Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 519v2 kids' performance shoe is made with a versatile upper and a signature REVlite midsole to form a classic shoe that's comfortable, durable and pairs effortlessly with all of your kid's go-to gear. This pair of running shoes for kids is designed with no-sew overlays to help ensure a top-notch fit and a sleek feel that's perfect for all-day, any-day wear. The synthetic and mesh construction offers breathability and a proper fit, so your little one can tackle whatever their day throws at them, from recess shenanigans with friends to after-school practice. Best of all is the cool style of these cushioned running shoes for kids. Fun, playful colors and eye-catching patterns make for a pair of sneakers that fashion-conscious youngsters will love.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
Comfortable Kids' Running Shoes: Thanks to the REVlite midsole, which delivers incredibly lightweight cushioning, these kids' running shoes easily go from the classroom to the playground and beyond
Great Fit: Designed with no-sew overlays to ensure a sleek fit and incredible feel, these kids' performance shoes will be a joy to wear for your active little one
Breathable Comfort: The synthetic and mesh uppers on these New Balance kids' running shoes create amazing breathability, helping to keep their feet comfortable when the pace picks up
Incredible Support: With a strong and durable rubber outsole, these kids' shoes provide impressive support and can stand up to daily wear-and-tear, no matter what your child gets up to
Fun, Kid-Friendly Design: These shoes are designed for kids first, with playful colors, patterns and fun designs they're sure to love whether they're headed to school, practice or the park

reviews.title: MY new blue shoes!

These are so bright and fun, he loves running around and showing them to everyone. My kid is a 5.5 per the foot measuring tool we have and these seem to fit just right. He’s so proud of these new shoes! I also love that they weren’t stupidly expensive.

title: Brooks Women's Ravenna 9 Road Running Shoe
description: Fall in love with the new Addiction 13. The BioMoGo DNA midsole provides adaptive cushioning, while the Extended Progressive Diagonal Rollbar guarantees stability and comfort. The Segmented Crash Pad allows a soft and flowing heel-toe transition. If you add to all this an extra-comfortable upper in perforated mesh for moisture transpiration, you will discover why these shoes are addictive, but without any unpleasant side effects. Features: The BioMoGo DNA midsole offers adaptive cushioning, the Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot ensures smooth transitions, the Omega Flex Grooves improve flexibility, great for running on the road, ideal for those with medium arched feet / flat, ideal for those with moderate pronation, 12 mm thick midsole. Weight 383 gr.
features: Imported

reviews.title: Love these shoes
reviews.text: Very light weight and breathable. My favorite running shoes, I own several pair.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT SHOES RECOMMENDED BY PHYSICAL THERAPIST
reviews.text: I was recently diagnosed with Osteonecrosis and had to have a right total hip replacement due to collapsed hip socket.  My physical therapist recommended these for excellent support, mostly for my heel and ankle.  She was spot on.  Once the shoes were "broken in" they are wonderfully comfortable.  I did find them a bit tight across the top of my foot but gradually relaxed as I wore them.  I like that the tongues are also laced in.

reviews.title: Brooks is awesome yet again!
reviews.text: Love Brooks! My favorite running shows! They are consistently awesome no matter the model.

reviews.title: LOVE Brooks Tennies!!!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of Brooks and I’ll never buy anything else. They are SUPER comfy and SUPER durable. I have a history of Plantar Fasciitis (as many people who have worked 12-hr hosp shifts), and I’m EXTREMELY picky about my shoes. Brooks have EXCELLENT arch support. I require orthotics in most shoes that I wear, but not Brooks. I had my last pair for over 3 yrs of frequent wear. They are still structurally sound, but showing some cosmetic signs of wear. I bought this new pair for our 3-month trip in Europe. I have worn them for a week, and that is plenty to be assured that they are “broken in”. They are super comfy right out of the box!!

reviews.title: Great shoes for being in your feet. Lost a bit of cushion compared to previous versions.
reviews.text: I love Brooks and I’ve always worn Ravenna’s. I’m an ER nurse and I walk a lot, these are my go to work shoe. I wish there was a wee bit more arch support and I seem to feel they used to have more cushion overall, but an insert will make them perfect.

title: Klitch Footwear Clip Sports Accessory, Hang Extra Shoes Cleats Boots or Gear on Your Bag. Works on Soccer, Baseball, Basketball, Track, Running Shoes, Flip Flops and More.
description: The Klitch is a footwear clip that allows you to hang extra sneakers or cleats to the outside of your bag. This avoids getting the inside of your bag dirty, smelly, and full. Great for anyone who plays sports, works out, or has an active lifestyle. The Klitch can be used for any type of footwear up to 10 lbs!
features: PATENTED: The Klitch Footwear Clip allows you to carry extra shoes outside your bag allowing your shoes to air out and the contents of your bag to stay clean and fresh!
QUICK & EASY: No more messy and difficult knots to tie or untie. Quickly and easily clamp and clip extra shoes or equipment to your bag with no fuss!
PERFECT FOR SPORTS: Great for soccer cleats, football cleats, baseball spikes, basketball shoes, track shoes, hiking boots, flip-flops and much more!
ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!
CUSTOMER FIRST: The Klitch Footwear Clip includes a 1-year full replacement when purchased through Klitch!

reviews.title: Runs a tad large, order 1/2 size down.. still 5+ stars!!!!
reviews.text: I have bought New Balance 1260’s for years and I am always a size 10.  This shoe was too big as a 10 and I had to return for a 9.5.  That being said, I still give it 5 stars and would give more if I could!  These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

reviews.title: Great shoes though
reviews.text: Even though I ordered wide width they are a little more snug across the ball of my foot than my other new Balance shoes of the same size.  Great shoes though.  Very comfortable and lightweight.  Love the color too!

reviews.title: These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit

features: Imported

Heel Clutching System Technology - Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
FluidFit Upper - ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.

Ortholite Lasting - This lasting material features plush underfoot comfort while providing excellent moisture management and a high level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of ATP Manufacturing LLC.)

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner - This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of ATP Manufacturing LLC.)

reviews.title: a lite duty general purpose shoe
reviews.text:
I hd to send back my normal size, a 9EEE, for a size larger. I've had this variation in size before with New Balance so beware. I'm still giving it 5 stars for style and price.

You may have noticed that price varies considerably with the color sub/style you choose. Mine were only $21 while others are substantially more. I assume construction is the same on all of them? Maybe the price is based on the current inventory? My price dropped slightly after I ordered.

While it is sold as a running shoe (?) and is probably adequate for this purpose a serious high mileage runner would probably pay more to get more. If you can get the right price point as I did they are certainly worth a try as a general purpose/athletic/walking shoe.

reviews.title: Not peach colored
reviews.text:
First off, I thought these were a peach color...WRONG. Very bright! Since I will be using them for working out, it's not that big of deal.
Secondly, they feel on the smaller side. I always wear an 8 1/2 in Nike, but then seem a little snug. I loosened the laces and wore them around the house and I guess I will get use to them.
Definately not my favorite pair of shoes, but I hate the hassle of returning in stuff, so will keep them and see how it goes.

reviews.title: Love these shoes!

reviews.title: Sizing is WAY OFF!
reviews.text: Love the shoe but OMG the sizing is WAY OFF! I have ordered this shoe four times consecutively and each time they run SUPER SMALL. My 10 year old daughter wears a 6.5 and I have had to order a 9 after ordering a 7, 7.5 and an 8.5 and none of those fit her. I will update my review once the 9’s come in. We order shoes every 4-6 months and she loves Nikes but these are made in Vietnam versus her last pair made in India and the sizing couldn’t be more off! See photos!

COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.

features: Improve Running Speed and Safety: Running or sports enthusiast, you must not miss this Track Spikes! This pyramid spikes will add the friction between the shoe sole and ground, thus can resist skid and improve your running speed.

Quality Spikes for Track Shoes : Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Providing long servicing life.These spikes are suitable for all athletic tracks, and field or cross country surfaces,help you get better grades.

Small Spikes Size : Perfect size 1/4"extra track spikes, full length is 0.5”(12.8mm), pyramid needle design, spike wrench size 2"*1.8". Easy to match with most of the track shoes, bring you superior traction, strength and durability
Widely Usage : The spikes provide optimal grip for track and field or dry terrain in cross-country, ideal for track sprints, long jump, running, outdoor sports activities

Enough Quantity Spikes : Package include 110 pieces pyramid track spikes with 1 pieces spike wrench and 1 pieces transparent storage box, easy to carry and convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.

reviews.title: Comfort, arch support and great looking!
reviews.text: My internist and her medical staff wore this fantastic sneaker at my first appointment. They were so good looking, stylish and interesting that I went searching for them when I got home!  They come lots of trendy colors and fit true to size. I bought one pair and enjoyed walking in them so much that I ordered a second pair in red! A small stylish loop on the heel allows you to easily put them on and take them off.  These sneakers are sooo comfy and have good arch support! Doc approved!

reviews.title: So comfy!

reviews.title: Made in China.  As written on the shoes. . . They are "mediocre" but decent overall.
reviews.text:
These are “mediocre” shoes. You know that because written on them is “Just So So”. Why a company would advertise that their shoes are “Just So So”. . . But. . . These shoes are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. . . So. . . Perhaps it’s a phrase that’s “lost in translation”.

Though you can’t see it perfectly in the pictures. . . The soles of these shoes are see-through. The sole is hard plastic with a non-stop bottom. The uppers are mesh, so they are “airy”. The footbed has nice arch support, which is a bit unusual for Chinese shoes. Nice padding on the footbed, as well as around the ankle.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe
description:
After 18 years of innovation, the Nimbus® series continues as one of the most recognized high performing footwear by ASICS. The new gel® placement offers modernized geometry of cushioning, designed to improve adaptability and mitigate brisk impacts. Improved guidance line® technology harmoniously syncs componentry to embrace the motions of the runner gait cycle.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FluidRide: FluidRide  provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement on multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidFit:  ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
Seamless construction

title: New Balance Men's 410 V6 Trail Running Shoe
description:
Be off-road ready in the New Balance 410v6 men’s trail shoe. Featuring a durable AT Tread rubber outsole, this shoe is fit for any adventure. Made with a sleek upper, ACTEVA midsole technology and a cushioned NB Comfort Insert, the versatile men’s running shoe is designed to keep you comfortable and stylish before, during and after your hike.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
ACTEVA midsole cushioning delivers versatile, flexible support
AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities
Lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole provides lightweight cushioning
NB Comfort Insert offers additional cushioning
Synthetic/mesh upper

reviews.title: Not the best looking shoe but the most comfortable!
reviews.text: Man my feet hurt. And because I wear the same shoes everyday all day they break down pretty quickly.  These are perfect.  The color isn't my absolute favorite BUT that was the color that was on sale. Besides I'm nearly 50 so I'm not out to impress anyone lol.  They fit my feet perfectly and  there is no better feeling of new shoes when your old shoes broke down! Just enough support.

reviews.title: TREAT IT LIKE A SOCK
reviews.text:
PROS: Lightweight; very soft rubber soles (I would say strictly intended for inside use if you want them to last); and extremely comfortable.
CONS: Laces are too long (I replaced with "Lock Laces"); there's a learning curve to putting them on so as to avoid pulled muscles, damaged back, dislocated shoulder. Think about how you put on socks, then practice. These are not "shoes."

reviews.title: Very nice comfortable shoes
reviews.text: I like them very much, stylish, lots of compliments.  Color is perfect. (light Blue)

reviews.title: It's okay!
reviews.text:
These are based off the famous shoe from the other brand , it rhymes with Beezy450, which costs $100s of dollars! They are just a sock mesh put into a mold, where hot rubber is poured into the bottom which makes the sole. Put in a soft insole and boom, you got a foam runner shoe. Well these shoes are the same thing as the big brand, just without any logos.
The fit is not good for wide feet. They are only good for narrow and normal. If your feet is identical to the mold that they use for generic sizes, then it will fit you perfect and be very comfortable.
These are casual shoes and won't be great for dedicated sports like basketball or cross-country. 5-stars for being a great alternative to big name brands and for being very affordable. I can't think of anything bad to say about this shoe.

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: These shoes are lightweight, trendy & comfortable. Most shoes don't have all 3 for me. The price is great and are better than some of the tip brands out there. I definitely recommend these shoes. The quality is better than I expected.

reviews.title: Fit was expected
reviews.text: These are comparable to my name-brand sneakers. They fit well and are comfortable to wear, I'm very pleased with them and recommend them.
